jean-luc-picard.title: Jean-Luc Picard
jean-luc-picard.content: Captain of the USS Enterprise-D. Known for his tactical brilliance and diplomatic skills.
jean-luc-picard.lore: Captain of the USS Enterprise-D. Known for his tactical brilliance and diplomatic skills.

uss-enterprise-d.title: USS Enterprise-D
uss-enterprise-d.content: The flagship of the United Federation of Planets. A Galaxy-class starship designed for exploration and defense.
uss-enterprise-d.lore: The flagship of the United Federation of Planets. A Galaxy-class starship designed for exploration and defense.

united-federation-of-planets.title: United Federation of Planets
united-federation-of-planets.content: An interstellar union of planetary governments that agree to exist semi-autonomously under a single central government.
united-federation-of-planets.lore: An interstellar union of planetary governments that agree to exist semi-autonomously under a single central government.

borg-collective.title: Borg Collective
borg-collective.content: A pseudo-species of cybernetic organisms that assimilate other species into their hive mind.
borg-collective.lore: A pseudo-species of cybernetic organisms that assimilate other species into their hive mind.
